title: ANC - UI
scenario: Transparency Mode Environment and Speech sub-settings remain disabled/greyed out when ANC/Adaptive is ON as default state
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Tap on ANC / Transparency Mode to open the feature screen.
5. Observe the default state of the screen.
expected: The ANC / Transparency Mode screen displays two sections: ANC (with Adaptive and Standard options) and Transparency (with Environment and Speech options). By default, ANC is ON with Adaptive selected, Transparency is OFF, and all Transparency-related values/options are disabled/greyed out.
